    labelBounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 9 (0-0)
    titleBounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 9
    typekill
    solarsystemsfNQWazDdUasynuRWngLdw
    subtypeboss
    maxLvl0
    key_kmDpr7qJk-urka70w8UWg
    descriptionOperative Smith: “We have managed to gather a lot more intel on the Nexar while you were gone. The Nexar are ruled by three Emperors. Apparently the Nexar value strength in battle as the main qualification for any position in their government. Every 4th year a competition is held, a battle royal until only three are left alive. These three are given the title of Emperor and are placed in charge of the empire for the next four years. Our agents reports that they await challenges from everyone in the middle of the 5ht circle. If you somehow could defeat them… maybe this war will finally end.”
    minLvl0
    dropoyYZDo-yZ0694_hLpGartQ
    tableMissionTypes
    availableYes
    addedEnemies["8OImi0OYL0KM5YVQa9kh6A"]
    completeDescriptionOperative Smith: “Unbelievable! You did it! Finally we beat the Nexar!”
    majorTypestatic
